subject: Product Management
title: The Lean Startup Approach
description: A quick win: understand The Lean Startup Approach.

hook.text: Eric Ries popularized a method for finding PMF fast: build-measure-learn loops as quickly as possible.

buildup.text: Build a minimum viable product, measure how users respond, learn from the data, and iterate or pivot.

discovery.text: The key insight: speed of iteration matters more than quality of execution. Learn faster, win faster.

twist.text: Many teams misuse 'lean' to mean 'ship fast and sloppy.' Ries meant 'learn fast' — iteration speed, not coding speed.

climax.text: The lean approach has helped thousands of startups find PMF faster by shortening the feedback loop.

quiz.question: What is the core principle of the lean startup approach?
options: Speed of learning matters more than speed of building
Ship as fast as possible regardless of quality
Avoid building anything until the market is proven
